findings.trace: OCR and translated/output both carry 1280x960 as QVGA. This mapping is non-standard (standard QVGA is 320×240; 1280×960 is QVGA-H or QXGA sub-variant). However this appears to mirror the source textbook verbatim, so not an OCR error.
findings.recommended_fix: No fix needed — faithfully reproduces source.
